raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX sold me three tickets to a XXXX XXXX performance at the Florida Theatre in XXXX. I paid {$370.00} for the XXXX tickets using my AMEX card. The tickets were not accepted at the Florida Theatre box office where I was informed that the XXXX tickets are illegally sold and invalid. The actual value of the three tickets is {$150.00}. XXXX merely `scalped ' them. i.e. sold them for more than their face value. 
This is illegal in Florida. 

I explained this to American Express with supporting documentation and asked the XXXX charge to be canceled. American Express insists that I pay the {$370.00} charge even though the three tickets sold by XXXX were not accepted at the performance venue.
